overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The player navigates wet reflective highways, passes under overpasses and through tunnels, and maneuvers around urban intersections surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed on wet reflective highway, passing holographic billboards

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement featuring a samurai character on the left side of the highway
tall modern glass buildings towering in the distance ahead
metal guardrail running along the left side of the highway
metal guardrail running along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane highway at night, with the motorcycle traveling at speed past glowing holographic billboards. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance while metal guardrails line both sides of the road, reflecting the neon lights of the cyberpunk city.

lighting shifts from colorful neon to artificial white underpass lights

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered highway section under the overpass

thick concrete support pillars on the left side of the underpass
thick concrete support pillars on the right side of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a covered overpass section where the sky is blocked by concrete infrastructure. The lighting changes from vibrant neon to artificial white lights as the vehicle passes between thick concrete pillars, temporarily obscuring the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: exiting underpass back to open highway with visible skyline

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway past clusters of neon billboards and glass facades

tall building with reflective glass windows on the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens back up to the night sky with towering glass skyscrapers on the right and clusters of neon billboards on the left. The motorcycle accelerates along the wet highway, with the city lights reflecting off the road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass tunnel with overhead lighting and traffic

events.description: entering enclosed underpass tunnel with artificial lighting
slowing down behind traffic in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: navigating through the enclosed tunnel following other vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: solid concrete ceiling of the enclosed underpass section
row of overhead artificial lights illuminating the tunnel
smooth concrete walls lining the left side of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a fully enclosed tunnel section where the sky is no longer visible. Overhead artificial lights illuminate the concrete walls and ceiling as the rider slows down to follow a silver sedan ahead, navigating the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting tunnel into urban intersection with crosswalk markings
slowing and turning right at the intersection
navigating through crosswalk area with yellow stripes

agents.ego_description: slowing down and making turns through the city intersection, navigating crosswalks

notable_agents.action: blue car passing through the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: city street intersection with multiple lanes and turning paths
yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the road
multi-story commercial building with illuminated windows on the left
urban building facade with storefronts on the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the motorcycle enters an urban intersection marked with yellow crosswalk stripes. The rider slows down and executes a right turn, passing commercial buildings on both sides while a blue car crosses from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit highway with overpasses and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: cruising along the neon-lit highway with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic and reflective wet roads

glowing holographic ad displays on the left side of the highway
glowing holographic ad displays on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a vividly lit section of highway bathed in pink and cyan neon lights. Holographic advertisements line both sides of the road while an overpass structure looms ahead, with the wet asphalt creating mirror-like reflections of the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with yellow markings and concrete barriers

events.description: entering elevated curved highway section with yellow road markings
navigating through curves on the elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: riding through curved elevated highway with city lights visible in the distance

entered.detail: curved section of elevated highway with banking turn
prominent yellow lane markings and stripes on the road surface
concrete safety barriers along the left side of the elevated road
concrete safety barriers along the right side of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the motorcycle navigating a curved elevated highway ramp marked with prominent yellow lines. Concrete barriers line both sides of the road as the vehicle banks through the curves, with the distant city lights visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from open highways through confined concrete structures and finally onto an elevated ramp. It begins on a wet multi-lane highway flanked by glowing holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers, before the view narrows as the motorcycle enters a covered overpass beneath heavy concrete pillars. The scene then opens back up to the night sky and towering buildings before plunging into a fully enclosed tunnel where artificial lights illuminate the concrete walls. Upon exiting the tunnel, the camera slows through an urban intersection with yellow crosswalks and commercial buildings, shifting into a vividly lit corridor of pink and cyan neon reflections. Finally, the motorcycle accelerates onto a curved elevated highway ramp, banking through concrete barriers toward the distant city lights.
